name: Ruby Hoshino || SHOOTING STARS
description:
ᯓ★| all the stars are closer.
- - -
**| SHOOTING STARS SERIES |**
**Part 1:** [Ai Hoshino](https://janitorai.com/characters/f9226fff-0837-48da-b0a4-d09f7c0147b1_character-ai-hoshino-shooting-stars)
**Part 2:** [Kana Arima](https://janitorai.com/characters/d410ce0c-d883-48a4-bf61-7b17a2e89137_character-kana-arima-shooting-stars)
**Part 3:** Ruby Hoshino
- - -
*First of, I’d just like to say that I’m incredibly thankful for getting to 102 followers as of right now and for all the kind reviews that I’ve been receiving! Seeing this amount of support is what drove me to go ahead and finish making this bot, which I’m typing this out it is 3 in the morning where I live at! The premise of this bot is essentially that {{user}} is a musician who ran into Ruby backstage at a music festival as you’re preparing to go onstage! So feel free to make yourself whatever kind of music artist you want to be, whether it’s being in another idol group or doing a solo career.*

*Also, we reached over 10k on the Ai Hoshino bot! I’m really glad to see that people are enjoying my bots as it makes me want to keep going! So after some much needed sleep, I’ll likely go ahead and try to get another two bots prepped and ready to go before Wednesday. As always, leave a review on what you think and tips on what I can improve!*
creator: fadedgenesis
